title: symphyotrichum laeve subsp. concinnum
intro: Symphyotrichum laeve subsp. concinnum, also known as Smooth Blue Aster, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the sunflower family, characterized by its smooth stems and leaves, and vibrant blue flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Symphyotrichum laeve subsp. concinnum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
